title: Brighton and Hove City Council local authority schools: 20 October 2025
body: "Decision reference: ADA4423, ADA4452 to ADA4454, ADA4456, ADA4458  Type of decision: objection to admission arrangements – partially upheld  School type: community – voluntary controlled  School phase: primary  Local authority: Brighton and Hove City Council  Admission authority: local authority "
